pageContext.name: Popp
pageContext.description: The impeccably trained Grand Sorcerer Popp from DRAGON QUEST THE ADVENTURE OF DAI is joining the ARTFX J series!  His brave and courageous gaze along with the Medroa spell he has unleashed create a supremely stylish finish. The base contains the largest LED ever used by Kotobukiya, which brilliantly illuminates Popp's heroic form and Medroa.  By swapping out the left leg part, the figure can be displayed without any effects. The weird belt Popp received from Matoriv is also faithfully recreated. Popp, the most powerful sorcerer in history, worthy of his ultimate title, has been created!
